recommendations.title: Spookies
recommendations.overview: Taking a wrong turn, travelers find themselves trapped in a mysterious house. One horror after another threatens them, as the sorcerer who lives within needs sacrifices to give eternal life to his beautiful bride.
recommendations.director: Genie Joseph, Brendan Faulkner, Thomas Doran

recommendations.title: Art of the Devil
recommendations.overview: When Boom suffers abandonment and abuse by Prathan, she decides to use black magic to take revenge on him and his family.

recommendations.title: Las leyendas: El origen
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Fantasy, Adventure, Family, Horror
recommendations.overview: When a human baby crosses the Eternal Mirror, the portal between the living and the dead opens its path to the beings from the underworld.

recommendations.title: The Blood on Satan's Claw
recommendations.overview: After a landsman in 18th century England discovers a corpse covered in fur buried in a field, the town becomes infected by "the devil's skin," leading the local children to engage in demonic rituals and criminal behavior.

recommendations.title: Art of the Devil 2
recommendations.overview: A beautiful teacher is wronged by six of her students. Calling on demons and forces of black magic, she extracts an ultra-gruesome retribution against each of them.
recommendations.director: Yossapong Phonsup, Kongkiat Khomsiri, Pasith Buranajan, Putipong Saisikaew, Isara Nadee, Art Thamthrakul, Seree Phongnithi

recommendations.title: Jurassic Shark
recommendations.genres: Horror, Science Fiction, Action, Adventure, Thriller
recommendations.overview: When an oil company unwittingly unleashes a prehistoric shark from its icy  prison, the Jurassic killer maroons a group of art thieves and a group of  college students on an abandoned island

recommendations.title: Big Fish & Begonia
recommendations.overview: Beyond the human realm, there is a magical race of beings who control the tides and the changing of the seasons. One of these beings, a young girl named Chun, seeks something more—she wants to experience the human world! At sixteen, she finally gets

recommendations.title: The Evil Dead
recommendations.overview: In 1979, a group of college students find a Sumerian Book of the Dead in an old wilderness cabin they've rented for a weekend getaway.

recommendations.title: Buried Alive
recommendations.overview: A college prank at an abandoned house accidentally awakens a frightening spirit.

recommendations.title: Deathgasm
recommendations.overview: Two teenage boys unwittingly summon an ancient evil entity known as The Blind One by delving into black magic while trying to escape their mundane lives.
